calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-22-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as a reassignment from the Presiding Judge's Department for court trial:
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, and CSR: Brenda Fields
Nathan Austin, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff .
Defendant Alita Samuels appeared in pro per.

10:15 AM: Opening statement by plaintiff Mr. Austin, testimony and evidence presented.
Witness Ines Blackman sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1: 3-day notice and proof of service...ID/EVID
10:18 AM: No cross examination by defendant
10:20 AM: Plaintiff witness, Jessical Canty, sworn and direct examination by counsel.
10:22 AM: No cross by defendant, Defendant stated there is no disagreement in owing back rent.
After hearing witnesses testimony and evidence presented by parties, the matter is submitted.
The court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant, Alita Samuels for restitution and possession located at 538 Brunswick St., San Francisco, CA
Money judgment of $5,204.88 for back rent and per diem damage. No attorney fees.
Costs of $328.30
Forfeiture of rental agreement. WRIT to be issued.
Judgment signed in open court, Plaintiff stipulated in court for return of exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Assigned To Trial Court
